violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed without proper hair restraint.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Hand towel hung from apron. Recommend using single use paper towels.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. Operate as follows... 1) Hot soapy water 2) Clear water rinse 3) Sanitizing rinse 4) Air dry all utensils
